tweets.text:
CBP officers in Texas apprehended a resident alien who was wanted by a sheriff's office in Minnesota for alleged rape. During secondary inspection, the man was identified as a subject for an arrest warrant and has been transported to the county jail.

➡️ https://t.co/p8SxuhC6Ir https://t.co/eQAiSiRf3K

Here are some of the programs you can enroll in: https://t.co/lxPLfsEoLK https://t.co/IBXiR2RkKF

tweets.text:
You lost. We won. GAME OVER. 

A U.S. citizen returning from Mexico was arrested for attempting to smuggle 45.2lbs of cocaine through a port in El Paso, TX.  A drug-sniffing K9 and x-ray confirmed the drugs were hidden in the vehicle's rocker panels. 

➡️ https://t.co/cmGQuaDs5x https://t.co/iqbaLgjEfq

▶️ https://t.co/hd95NhMmX8 https://t.co/iincZvixeL

tweets.text:
Tiene el poder—auto-depórtese.

¿Se encuentra ilegalmente en los EE. UU.? Evite ser arrestado, auto-depórtese con la aplicación CBP Home, y podrá ser elegible a incentivos. Es seguro, económico y tendrá más posibilidades de poder regresar legalmente. 

➡️ https://t.co/ewFAgAHoou https://t.co/8On4InUbV2

tweets.text:
The power is yours—self-deport.

Aliens in the U.S. illegally may be eligible for incentives by self-deporting with the CBP Home App. It's safer, cost effective, and gives more hope of lawful reentry in the future. Avoid arrest and self-deport now.

➡️ https://t.co/ewFAgAHoou https://t.co/eQLcfP9M8B
